message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Review already sent, one blocker: project name on next actions">
CI green noted. My full review was already sent -- check your earlier messages. 

Quick recap: one BLOCKING item (B1). The Next Actions page needs to show the project name for project-linked actions. US-GTD-3 criterion #4: "Each action shows its title, context, and associated project (if any)." The `NextActionView` struct needs a `project_name: Option<String>` field, and `next_action_item.html` needs a conditional project badge.

Everything else in Step 6 looks solid. Once B1 is fixed, you have my consensus.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Marty also seems to be reviewing Step 6 content. The `next_action_item.html` already has the project name badge -- this was addressed in Step 6. Let me verify and redirect him.

file.content: • {{ action.title }} {% if let Some(pname) = action.project_name %} {{ pname }} {% endif %} {{ action.context_name }} Edit

content.text: Confirmed -- the project name badge is already implemented at lines 13-15 of `next_action_item.html`. Marty is reviewing stale Step 6 content.

input.content: Marty, your B1 item is already resolved in the current codebase. The project name badge is implemented at `templates/next_action_item.html` lines 13-15: ```html {% if let Some(pname) = action.project_name %} {{ pname }} {% endif %} ``` This was part of Step 6 (Projects), which already has 9/9 consensus and is committed. We are currently reviewing **Step 7 (Clarify as Project)** -- Carson's new code. The Step 7 changes are: - `src/services/inbox_service.rs` lines 169-251: new `clarify_as_project()` service function with transaction wrapping 4 operations (find inbox item, insert project, insert next action, delete inbox item) - `src/routes/inbox.rs` lines 207-289: updated `ClarifyForm` with `clarify_type` and `first_action_title` fields - `templates/inbox_item.html`: radio buttons (Next Action / Project), "First action" text input, fieldset with legend - `static/css/main.css` lines 1226-1305: progressive disclosure of project fields via CSS `:has()` selector - `tests/api/inbox.rs` lines 836-1143: 8 new integration tests for clarify-as-project Could you review the Step 7 changes against the user story (US-GTD-2: clarify path for InboxItem -> Project + first NextAction) and provide your verdict?
input.summary: B1 already resolved in Step 6, please review Step 7 changes
